name: Andromeda Galaxy
description: The nearest major spiral galaxy to the Milky Way.

name: Orion Nebula
description: A bright diffuse nebula and active stellar nursery.

name: Pleiades
description: A prominent nearby open cluster known as the Seven Sisters.

name: Sombrero Galaxy
description: A galaxy notable for its bright nucleus and dust lane.

name: Ring Nebula
description: A planetary nebula formed from a dying Sun-like star.

name: Lagoon Nebula
description: A giant interstellar cloud containing an active star-forming region.

name: Eagle Nebula
description: Home of the Pillars of Creation, a famous star-forming structure.

name: Whirlpool Galaxy
description: A classic interacting spiral galaxy with prominent arms.

name: Crab Nebula
description: A remnant of the supernova observed in 1054 CE.

name: Omega Centauri
description: The largest known globular cluster in the Milky Way.

name: Triangulum Galaxy
description: A nearby spiral galaxy and member of the Local Group.

name: Helix Nebula
description: A large and nearby planetary nebula with a ring-like appearance.
